condition: dashboard showed running and persistent runtime information but did not explicitly separate actual long-run evidence from short-window harness checks and stub-only runtime estimates
impact: operator could over-trust a short safe run as live-review-grade long-run evidence; this increases UX false-safe risk while live remains blocked
fix: runtime_evidence_boundary was added to the dashboard shell, schema, HTML, runtime artifacts, and negative tests so actual long-run evidence remains visibly separate and cannot drift into live permission
